title: Sour Wheat Pilaf
description: A light and refreshing Ukrainian-inspired pilaf featuring wheat and a hint of sour flavor.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the pilaf (rice) and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the whole wheat and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the sour (pickle juice or vinegar) and silky (Greek yogurt).
Add the Ukrainian spice (dried dill weed) and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve.
